name: forge_content_validate
description: Validate cms/*.json files against the typed CmsPage schema (mirrored from PlausiDen-Loom's loom-cms-render). Catches unknown section variants, missing required fields, and structural drift before the build pipeline encounters them. Faster feedback than running the full `forge build`. Reads `cms-schema.json` and applies serde(deny_unknown_fields) at every boundary per AVP-Doctrine rule sec-001.

path.description: Specific cms file to validate. Default: every cms/*.json under the forge root.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
